## Runtime.IChocolateLibraryParams.fileSources property

File tree sources to load data from. Each source navigates to standard paths (data/ingredients, data/recipes) and loads collections according to the source's load spec.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly fileSources?: ILibraryFileTreeSource | ReadonlyArray<ILibraryFileTreeSource>;
```
